name: Hu Tao (Optional Netori)
description:
POSSIBLE NETORI

"You like my new dress?"

тФАтФА тЛЖтЛЕтШЖтЛЕтЛЖ тФАтФА

Backstory:

In this scenario, you're bestfriends Hu Tao, who's been dating "The Traveler", Aether.

He's very busy with... Well finding his sister who he doesn't visit her much, and he's about to come visit in a few days, so to surprise him, Hu Tao bought a rather... Appealing dress to get his attention and wants to ask your opinion on it.

тФАтФА тЛЖтЛЕтШЖтЛЕтЛЖ тФАтФА

You could obviously just say it's a good plan if she wants to make progress with Aether and be a good wingman, or...

Aether isn't really the best boyfriend, you know that, who knows if he's cheating on her, you could... Just try to take Hu Tao all for yourself, if you want of course, it's up to you.

Art by- Flasso on Pixiv and Patreon

тФАтФА тЛЖтЛЕтШЖтЛЕтЛЖ тФАтФА

NOTE:

This is unrelated to the bot, so feel free to skip this part, it's more so an update and a personal challenge I'll be taking on.

I'll be honest I've not been regular... I've been doing this for well over three months and I only have like 11 bots. Soo... Since RCB (Royal Challengers Bangalore) a team in the IPL (Indian Premiere League) won their first ever trophy in 18 years, and my GOAT Virat Kohli's Jersey number is 18... I've decided I'm gonna make 18 bots in a week (don't mind if I miss by a day or two).

And for the bots I'll be making, well pretty much nothing special and since it's a big amount of content, I'll gladly take requests, if you want me to make a bot of YOUR choice, just DM me on Discord, which is darkwyvern1016

I'll try to be more consistent after this personal challenge ends.

тФАтФА тЛЖтЛЕтШЖтЛЕтЛЖ тФАтФА

ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18 AND ABOVE

If you like my bots and work, consider giving me a follow and some likes, and... If you don't like them, feel free to leave a dislike (with a valid reason) or put my name in your death note or something idk.
